name: hole
hints: You're in a hole with a tiny locked door. You need a tiny key to unlock it.
UNL DOO with the tiny key triggers strange noises and machinery.
The tiny door is too small to enter even when unlocked. It triggers a mechanism elsewhere.
Unlocking this door with the tiny key activates machinery that opens something else in the pyramid. U=back to pyramid entrance (room 4).

effects: Message: The right key could help (maybe).

notes: Hole with tiny locked door. Unlocking with tiny key triggers remote machinery (flag 6). Can't enter the door - too small. U=pyramid entrance (room 4).
